speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Most urgent pressure node identify karna.
text: Abhi turant sabse heavy kya lag raha: body ki thakan, EMI deadline, ya overtime workload?

speaker: Seeker
text: EMI deadline. Bounce hua toh ghar ka mahol bigdega aur log bolenge shehar jaake bhi sambhala nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue pe short restatement-only containment.
text: EMI ke fail hone ka matlab tumhare liye financial loss se zyada izzat aur bharose ka tootna lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Isliye sab chupake karta hoon, kisi ko pata bhi nahi chalne deta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 + Duty_Based map se hidden burden reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tumne sab ka bharosa bachane ke liye apni thakan ko chhupa diya, aur wahi chhupa hua bojh tumhe andar se tod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi bola. Ab practical chahiye jo duty ke against na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Three duty-compatible micro actions dena.
text: Teen short steps: (1) 6-minute body reset, (2) EMI ke liye kal subah fixed call slot note, (3) overtime ka cap set karo - aaj max 90 minutes extra.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh manageable lag raha. Overtime cap helpful hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Selected steps ko exact order mein execute karwana.
text: Abhi 6-minute reset karo. Phir 2-minute mein kal ka EMI call slot likho. Uske baad overtime start karo aur 90-minute pe hard stop laga do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Reset se body thodi light lag rahi. Hard stop bhi set kar diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Health neglect aur chronic stress relation psychoeducation dena.
text: Health neglect ke saath long overtime rakhne se stress cycle aur tight hoti hai; small hard stops se system recover karta hai aur productivity better hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Panic down hua. Control jaisa feel ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Effort validate karna aur dignity preserve reassurance dena.
text: Tumne farz chhode bina apne system ko protect karne ka step liya, yeh bahut strong aur responsible move hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Steady feel aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Next-day ke liye minimal repeat plan dena.
text: Kal ka minimal plan: subah reset, EMI follow-up call, aur do priority blocks. Overtime cap same rakho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rhythm set lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Family-honour pressure common pattern normalize karna.
text: Jin logon pe family honour aur remittance expectation hoti hai, wo aksar health neglect karke overtime karte hain; structure lane se load halka padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Accha laga sunke, isolated kam feel hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty + recovery balance reflect karna.
text: Tum farz nibha rahe ho, lekin ab us tareeke se jahan tumhari health bhi system ka part rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, balance ka angle pehli baar practical lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Raat ke liye 2-minute closure ritual dena.
text: Aaj raat do lines likhna: "aaj kya protect kiya" aur "kal ka pehla step". Mind clutter kam hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likha. Mental release sa feel hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exhaustion ko chronic load response ke roop mein normalize karna.
text: Exhaustion under continuous duty pressure ek common physiological load response hai; recovery windows se hi stamina wapas build hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Confidence build ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se fear-driven mode se planned mode shift reflect karna.
text: Jahan pehle sirf EMI fear drive kar raha tha, ab tumhara plan tumhe drive kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Stable hold lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Agency and dignity reinforce karna.
text: Tumne pressure mein bhi smart boundaries set ki, yeh weakness nahi high-responsibility strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ready lag raha kal handle karne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final 2-anchor plan concise close ke liye.
text: Final anchors: subah reset + EMI follow-up first half mein. Overtime cap cross mat karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Doable hai. Isko follow karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se sustained routine reinforce karna.
text: Aaj jo sustainable rhythm banaya hai, usi ko repeat rakhna tumhari recovery ko protect karega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Better feel ho raha. Load halka lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closure pe resilience aur worth reinforce karna.
text: Tumne family honour aur duty dono sambhalte hue apne liye healthy boundaries banayi. Yeh tumhari strength aur value ka clear proof hai.
